title: Heartbeat-end: Wooded Flowering Leaf (f03dbd) — session-end per owner direction at 07:47Z, closeout broadcast follows
body: Final-heartbeat-end per PDR-078 + SKILL Closeout Contract. Owner direction at 07:47Z: "great, run a session handoff, then this session is finihsed".
